pr.title: docs(zen): add MiMo-V2.5 Free model
pr.body:
## Summary
- add MiMo-V2.5 Free to Zen endpoint and pricing tables
- document its limited-time free availability and privacy caveat
- apply the update across all localized Zen pages

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/dev...HEAD`
- rendered `http://localhost:4321/docs/zen` and `http://localhost:4321/docs/zh-cn/zen` locally
- pre-push hook: `bun turbo typecheck`
pr.author: MrMushrooooom
